title: Lost Treasure of the Emerald Eye
titleZh: 绿宝石之眼的失落宝藏
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's sister Thea drags him on a treasure hunt for the Emerald Eye — with cousin Trap and nephew Benjamin along for chaos! 💎

q.en: What newspaper does Geronimo Stilton run in New Mouse City?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿在老鼠岛首府新鼠城经营的是哪份报纸？

options.en: The Whisker Weekly according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 《胡须周刊》（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo runs The Rodent's Gazette, the newspaper where his sister Thea also works as a special correspondent.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩经营着《啮齿动物公报》，他的妹妹蒂奥也是这家报纸的特约记者。

q.en: Where did Thea say she found the treasure map for the Emerald Eye?
q.zh: 蒂奥说她是在哪里找到绿宝石之眼藏宝图的？

options.en: From a pirate according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 从一个海盗手里（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Thea pulled a yellowed map from under the table and said she found it at the flea market.
explain.zh: 蒂奥从桌子底下拿出一张泛黄的地图，说她是在跳蚤市场找到的。

q.en: What is the name of Trap's thrift shop?
q.zh: 特拉普的二手商店叫什么名字？

options.en: Trap's Treasures according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 特拉普的宝藏（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Trap runs a dusty thrift shop called Cheap Junk for Less, full of odd old items.
explain.zh: 特拉普经营着一家布满灰尘的二手商店，名叫“便宜破烂大甩卖”，里面全是稀奇古怪的旧东西。

q.en: What is the name of the ship the mice sail on to find the treasure?
q.zh: 老鼠们出海寻宝乘坐的船叫什么名字？

explain.en: Thea showed Geronimo a cheddar-colored boat owned by a retired sea captain, named the Lucky Lady.
explain.zh: 蒂奥给杰罗尼摩看了一艘退休老船长拥有的、切达奶酪色的船，名叫“幸运女士号”。

q.en: Who secretly stows away on the ship and is later found eating a Cheesy Chew in the kitchen?
q.zh: 谁偷偷溜上了船，后来被发现在厨房里吃“芝士啃啃”零食？

options.zh: 本杰明，杰罗尼摩的侄子

options.en: Mousella, the secretary according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 秘书莫塞拉（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo's young nephew Benjamin hid on board; he was caught munching a Cheesy Chew late at night.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩的小侄子本杰明偷偷上了船，深夜被抓到时正啃着“芝士啃啃”零食。

q.en: Trap claims to be an expert sailor, but what does Geronimo discover he really was?
q.zh: 特拉普自称是经验丰富的水手，但杰罗尼摩发现他其实是什么？

explain.en: During the storm Trap admits he was never a captain — he was a cook — and a book titled 'Learn How to Sail in Eight Hundred Easy Lessons' falls out, bookmarked at page 11.
explain.zh: 在暴风雨中特拉普承认自己从不是船长——他只是个厨师——这时一本叫《八百堂轻松学航海》的书掉出来，书签还夹在第11页。

q.en: Who rescues Geronimo when he is knocked overboard into the sea?
q.zh: 当杰罗尼摩被撞下海时，是谁救了他？

options.en: Trap, who grabs him by the ears
options.zh: 特拉普，抓住他的耳朵把他拉上来

options.en: Benjamin, with a rope according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 本杰明，用绳子（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Thea shouts 'Mouse overboard!' and Trap jumps in, grabs Geronimo by the ears and drags him back to the Lucky Lady.
explain.zh: 蒂奥大喊“老鼠落水啦！”，特拉普跳下去抓住杰罗尼摩的耳朵，把他拖回了“幸运女士号”。

q.en: At the THREE SKULLS, what word must they spell by jumping on the lettered stones to escape the trap?
q.zh: 在“三颗骷髅”处，他们必须踩着刻字的石头拼出哪个单词才能逃出陷阱？

explain.en: Geronimo solves the riddle ('white or yellow, sharp or mellow, lots of holes') — the answer is CHEESE, so they must hop on the stones spelling C-H-E-E-S-E.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩解开了谜语（“白色或黄色、浓烈或温和、有很多孔”），答案是CHEESE，所以他们必须踩着拼出C-H-E-E-S-E的石头。

q.en: At the ONE SKULL, what natural danger does Geronimo fall into?
q.zh: 在“一颗骷髅”处，杰罗尼摩掉进了什么自然危险里？

explain.en: Thea warns him the cheddar-colored rock marks quicksand; Geronimo sinks up to his ears until Trap pulls him out with a vine.
explain.zh: 蒂奥警告他那块切达奶酪色的石头标记着流沙；杰罗尼摩一直陷到耳朵，直到特拉普用藤蔓把他拉出来。

q.en: At the spot marked X, what do they actually find instead of the Emerald Eye?
q.zh: 在地图标记X的地方，他们实际找到的并不是绿宝石之眼，而是什么？

options.en: A pile of gold doubloons according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一堆金币（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A mouse resort with vacationing mice
options.zh: 一个老鼠度假村，里面都是度假的老鼠

explain.en: Instead of treasure, they meet a group of mice in bathing suits with cameras — it is a resort, and the X marks a lake/resort area.
explain.zh: 他们没找到宝藏，而是遇到了一群穿着泳衣、拿着相机的老鼠——那是个度假村，标记X的位置其实是一个湖／度假区。
